items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario regarding quiet hours.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the behavior of the system during quiet hours (no SMS from 10 PM to 8 AM). However, there is no evidence provided that directly addresses how the system handles notifications during these specified hours. The lack of concrete examples or outcomes related to the quiet hours scenario leads to an inconclusive status regarding the expected result of confirming behavior or producing a failure report.
